raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I was charged USD {$50000.00} by a XXXX  matchmaking company after what I understood to be a preliminary membership application and consultation process, not a finalized service agreement. 

The company already knew there were eligibility concerns under its own membership rules before accepting payment. Required documentation and approval steps were never completed, and I never received any actual matchmaking services. 

On XX/XX/year>, I immediately requested cancellation and a full refund. Despite this, the merchant refused a proper refund and demanded excessive penalties and fees, including approximately 30 % deductions and card processing fees. 

I disputed the transaction with BarclaysXXXX XXXX and submitted extensive supporting evidence, including contract provisions, cancellation messages, and documentation showing incomplete contract formation and eligibility issues. 

However, throughout the dispute process I have received inconsistent information regarding timelines ( XXXX  days, XXXX  days, XXXX  days, and XXXX billing cycles ), no clear written explanation regarding provisional credit or payment obligations, and no meaningful escalation assistance despite repeated requests. 

I am concerned about financial harm due to the size of the disputed amount and the lack of clear customer protection while the investigation remains pending.
